description: Information: Year Release: 2012 Genre: Sports / Sorccer Developer: Konami Publisher: Konami Platform: Windows Version: 1.4 Publication type: Repack Interface language: English, German, French, Italian, Spanish, Arabic, Greek, Russian, Swedish, Dutch, Portuguese, Portuguese (Brazil), Turkish, Chinese, Korean, Spanish Mexico Audio language: English, German, French, Italian, Spanish, Japanese, Greek, Arabic, Russian Crack: ISO-Image emulation or NoDVD System Requirements: CPU: Intel Core 2 Duo 1.8 GHz or equivalent AMD processor CPU SPEED: 1.8 GHz RAM: 1 GB OS: XP, Vista and Windows 7 VIDEO CARD: Nvidia Geforce 6600 or ATI Radeon x1200 or Intel HD graphics 3000 PIXEL SHADER: 2.0 VERTEX SHADER: 2.0 SOUND CARD: Yes DEDICATED VIDEO RAM: 256 MB Description: Pro Evolution Soccer 2013 (PES 2013, known as World Soccer: Winning Eleven 2013 in Japan and South Korea) is an association football video game, developed and published by Konami. The game was announced by Konami on April 18, 2012. For the first time of the series, all 20 teams from the Brazilian national league, Campeonato Brasileiro Serie A, are included in the game series. The UEFA Champions League and UEFA Europa League features in the game. PES 2013 was succeeded by Pro Evolution Soccer 2014. PES 2013 is also the last game released for the PlayStation 2 in North America before its discontinuation. Installation Tutorial: 1. Download PES13.7z 2. Extract PES13.7z archive any where 3. Mount PES2013_DVD1.iso in Daemon Tools or Alcohol. 4. Start setup.exe and install game. 5. Mount PES2013_DVD2.iso in Daemon Tools or Alcohol. Launching a Game With an Emulation ISO Image: mount file PES2013_DVD1.mds image to the SCSI drive in Daemon Tools Lite starting 4.45.4 before launching the game. Launching the game WITHOUT an ISO-image: Copy the files from NoDVD that are from the second disc to the game folder. 6. Play and enjoy Additional Information: This game original EXE tested in Windows Server 2019 version 1809 build 17763. Original EXE Not Working in Windows Server 2019 version 1809.
